blog_post.title: Your AI Agent Forgot Everything Again, Here Is the Fix
blog_post.meta_description: Why stateless AI sessions keep breaking your flow, and how a 3-tier memory system fixes it.
blog_post.body_md:
# Your AI agent forgot everything again

Every new session starts with a tax: repeat the project, repeat the last decision, repeat the current focus. `/memory` fixes that with HOT, WARM, and COLD memory tiers that survive session compactions.

## The bug
Stateless sessions feel smart for one conversation and useless in the next.

## The fix
Install `/memory`, connect your working context, and let the agent reload what matters.

## The architecture
HOT = live working state. WARM = durable decisions and facts. COLD = compiled knowledge that compounds over time.

faq.a: It stops you from re-explaining durable context every new session.
AI/LLM developers, Claude Code users, and indie hackers tired of session resets.

hero.headline: Your AI agent forgot everything again
hero.subhead: /memory keeps project context, last decisions, and current focus alive across sessions.
